title: Adascorp Fiscal Period Financial Report and Outlook: Message from the Chief Executive

{{Top|rwm|old}}
{{Youmay|the real-world text page|the in-universe report of the [[Adascorp Fiscal Period Financial Report and Outlook: Message from the Chief Executive (report)|same name]]}}
{{Otheruses|Chief Executive}}
"'''Adascorp Fiscal Period Financial Report and Outlook: Message from the Chief Executive'''" was the news organ included in [[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]].
